sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this RPG

special_mechanics.name: Crystal Ball Radar
special_mechanics.description: HUD radar system showing player position at center with relative locations of nearby enemies, cities, dungeons, and runes. Enemies appear as white dots that trigger battle upon reaching center position.

special_mechanics.name: Overworld Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Safe areas (cities) vs enemy-infested areas with different movement mechanics. Mode 7 transition effects between exploration and battle screens.

physics_values.enemy_area_movement: quick movement required to evade enemies

tier_notes: Tier 3: The 7th Saga is an RPG with turn-based combat and exploration mechanics. No precise physics parameters for character movement, gravity, or jump mechanics are documented. Movement in overworld is described qualitatively as fast-paced evasion during enemy encounters. This is not a platformer and does not feature physics-based movement systems typical of action games.
